home.title: Home
home.description: A Next.js template with organization-backed workspaces, invitations, email-domain restrictions, member roles, shared settings surfaces, and reusable product scaffolding.

openGraph.title: Home
openGraph.description: A template application with organization-backed workspace and collaboration flows.

home.heroDescription: This template now includes Better Auth organizations, slug-aware workspace routing, member directories, domain-aware invitation flows, and role-aware settings so you can start from a real multi-tenant foundation.
home.heroSecurity: OAuth login, verified invitation acceptance, domain restrictions, role-aware permissions
home.featuresTitle: Organization and workspace flows are included
home.featuresDescription: The branch now ships the core collaboration surface most SaaS products need before domain-specific features begin.
home.extensionsTitle: Workspace administration is ready to extend
home.extensionsDescription: Dedicated settings pages, invitation handling, team management, and role-aware controls give product teams concrete places to add billing, custom roles, or audit trails.
home.ctaDescription: Create a workspace, invite collaborators, assign roles, and shape the app around your domain.

routing.title: Organization-scoped routing
routing.description: Global dashboard entry resolves active or deterministic fallback organization context and redirects into slug-preferred workspace URLs.

actions.title: Protected workspace actions
actions.description: Create, update, delete, and switch workspace mutations use protected server actions with validation and cache invalidation.

database.title: Organization-backed data model
database.description: Prisma models now include organizations, members, invitations, active organization sessions, indexes, and repository cache tags.

auth.title: Better Auth organizations
auth.description: Workspaces preserve the product language while using Better Auth organization APIs for membership and permission checks.

features.title: Domain-aware invitations
features.description: Admins can restrict invitations to allowed email domains, users can accept or reject valid invites, and zero-workspace onboarding stays actionable.

ui.title: Settings and member management
ui.description: Workspace settings include general settings, allowed email domains, user lists, direct member adds, role edits, invitations, Better Auth Teams, and a placeholder section for roles.

clients.title: Workspace settings sections
clients.description: Extend the settings shell with billing, domain policies, audit logs, team-scoped resources, or other organization-level controls.

webhooks.title: Invitation lifecycle
webhooks.description: Build on pending, accepted, rejected, canceled, expired, and domain-restricted invitation states with email delivery or notifications.

storage.title: Role-aware permissions
storage.description: The owner, admin, and member model can evolve into custom roles while keeping assignment rules centralized.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Your account has been created. Here’s what this template includes.
welcome.includedDescription: Same overview as the public landing page — edit copy in template-landing-content.ts.

explore.title: Open your workspace
explore.description: Use the workspace switcher in the sidebar to find your current workspace.

customize.title: Customize the codebase
customize.description: Add your domain models, routes under src/app/, and feature modules under src/features/.

ship.title: Ship
ship.description: Deploy with your hosting provider and iterate — this template is only the foundation.

homeCta.title: Ready to continue?
homeCta.description: The template is ready. Open the dashboard and adapt it to your own service.
